context: The response should exercise the `evaluate-sessions` Context Specs skill using repo-specific harness behavior.

checklist.name: reads_build_trail
checklist.description: Says to read the relevant agent session logs/build trail across planning/implementation/review steps.

checklist.name: identifies_context_gap
checklist.description: Focuses on finding where context was missing, stale, poorly routed, or ignored.

checklist.name: captures_regression
checklist.description: Recommends turning the failure into an eval, verifier, rule, doc, or memory update as appropriate.

checklist.name: separates_code_fix_from_context_fix
checklist.description: Distinguishes fixing the immediate PR from improving future agent behavior.

checklist.name: uses_diagnosis_first
checklist.description: Uses diagnosis-first language for STUCK or wrong-output cases.
